creator: martin@sugioarto.com
text:
What Yamagi suggested is OK. But please don't offer such a weird vimrc as default. Replace the contents with things that are reasonable and every vim user wants/expects. The current one does this:

- break copy and paste with mouse middle click
- has disturbing effects on color schemes
- produces too many files when editing (backup and undo file)

Here are useful settings that not many people will object to:

set nocompatible
set cryptmethod=blowfish2

And this is already all! Everything else I add here will make someone pop up and going mad about it. There might be still a question why change to cryptmethod, because the default encryption is insecure (fatal vulnerability found as described here: https://dgl.cx/2014/10/vim-blowfish).
